head.hi: Press Release Issued by the Department of State on October 2, 1932

p.hi: Data on the Report of the Commission of Enquiry

div.p: The package was found to contain two copies of the Text of the Report and two copies of a set of maps.
The Report contains an Introduction and ten Chapters.
The Introduction deals with the origin, the composition, and the mission of the Commission.
Chapter IX is entitled “Principles and Conditions of Settlement” and Chapter X, “Considerations and Suggestions to the Council.”
